summary: Added exponential backoff retry (up to PREMARKET_MAX_RETRIES times) to _fetch_premarket_price via extracted helper _attempt_premarket_fetch; changed _cache_key in us_stock_service to include UTC hour to prevent pre-market cache bleed into regular session; added 2 config constants; updated 2 existing tests to patch sleep; added 5 repo retry tests and 3 cache key service tests; all 674 tests pass, ruff clean, mypy clean, us_stock_repo.py at 100% coverage.
